title: Dugandiodendron emarginatum
taxonomy: Dugandiodendron emarginatum is classified within the plant family Annonaceae. This plant family is part of the order Magnoliales and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Dugandiodendron emarginatum is further categorized within the genus Dugandiodendron, which is a group of flowering plants. The exact classification can be broken down into its taxonomic hierarchy as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Magnoliids, Order: Magnoliales, Family: Annonaceae, Genus: Dugandiodendron, Species: D. emarginatum. This classification system is widely used in botany to identify and categorize plants based on their characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
